free_text: Spin-isospin strength distributions in f-p shell
nuclei: A study of the 51V(n,p) and 59Co(n,p)
reactions at 198 MeV
TRIUMF
Medium resolution spectrometer.
Polyethylene target for
calibration of cross section by observation of proton
peak from n-p scattering.  n-p cross section
calculated using program SAID.  Carbon target used to
provide reference spectrum for 12C(n,p) which was
subtracted from polyethylene spectrum.
Corrected for:
. background
. spectrometer acceptance
. effect of continuum on neutron source spectrum
No information on source of uncertainties.
Data received by electronic mail, 94/1/17, Abegg.

Status comment added.

corrected.
